texto: All systems in Pakistan appear to be in a haste to achieve something, which can have both positive and negative implications. Let us take a pause and examine the two fundamental questions: One, are we promoting the rule of law and the Constitution? Two, are we strengthening or weakening the institutions?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ashfaq Parvez Kayani que provoca temas ligados a sucesso. Ao questionar “All systems in Pakistan appear to be in a haste to achieve something, which can have both positiv…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, law, constitution, com foco em estudos e constitution.
